tool_args.label: Bus Operator Simulator Systems Procurement
tool_args.raw_text: a request to award a competitively negotiated contract for the purchase, installation, and maintenance of four Bus Operator Simulator (\"BOS\") systems to Etech Simulation Corporation (\"Etech\"). He stated this will be a six-year contract totaling $1.4 million.

payload.description: Competitively negotiated contract for purchase, installation, and maintenance of four Bus Operator Simulator (BOS) systems awarded to Etech Simulation Corporation. Six-year contract totaling $1.4 million.

evidence_refs.source_quote: a request to award a competitively negotiated contract for the purchase, installation, and maintenance of four Bus Operator Simulator ("BOS") systems to Etech Simulation Corporation ("Etech"). He stated this will be a six-year contract totaling $1.4 million.

tool_args.label: CNG Fueling Facilities O&M Extension
tool_args.raw_text: approval to exercise an option to extend the term of a miscellaneous service contract awarded to Trillium CNG for the operation and maintenance of compressed natural gas (\"CNG\") fueling facilities for the Department of Buses (\"DOB\") and MTA Bus Company for a period of three years in the total estimated amount of $10.1 million.

payload.project_name: CNG Fueling Facilities Operation and Maintenance
payload.description: Approval to exercise option to extend term of miscellaneous service contract with Trillium CNG for operation and maintenance of compressed natural gas (CNG) fueling facilities for the Department of Buses and MTA Bus Company. Three-year extension, total estimated amount of $10.1 million.

evidence_refs.source_quote: approval to exercise an option to extend the term of a miscellaneous service contract awarded to Trillium CNG for the operation and maintenance of compressed natural gas ("CNG") fueling facilities for the Department of Buses ("DOB") and MTA Bus Company for a period of three years in the total estimated amount of $10.1 million.

tool_args.label: Rockaways Rehab Project
tool_args.raw_text: President Crichlow discussed Congestion Relief and noted significant improvements to bus performance including better travel time and speed. He also discussed progress with the Rockaways Rehab Project and thanked the US Coast Guard, Schiavone Construction, MTA C&D, and the many divisions within the Department of Subways for their efforts.

payload.description: Rehabilitation project in the Rockaways. President Crichlow discussed progress and thanked US Coast Guard, Schiavone Construction, MTA C&D, and divisions within the Department of Subways for their efforts.

evidence_refs.source_quote: President Crichlow discussed Congestion Relief and noted significant improvements to bus performance including better travel time and speed. He also discussed progress with the Rockaways Rehab Project
